description_long: This is a compact, modern bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular form. The exterior is primarily finished in a light gray color, with a darker accent on the front facade that frames a single, wide window and a prominent door. The side view reveals a simple, open-plan interior layout, including a visible bed and a small partition wall, suggesting a studio-style living space. The rear and side elevations are largely unadorned, emphasizing the clean lines and geometric simplicity of the structure. The building sits on a slightly raised platform, with a small step leading to the entrance. The overall design is functional and contemporary, suitable for urban neighborhoods or compact residential lots.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a minimalist rectangular design, light gray exterior, and a prominent front window and door. The interior is open-plan with visible living and sleeping areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, a wide window, and a dark accent facade.
description_view_1: Side cutaway view revealing the interior layout, including a bed and partition wall.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, unadorned wall and a small step at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid exterior wall and the open end of the building.
